title: UPI Circle Payment Instrument
description: Payment instrument for UPI Circle (delegated) payments. Extends the base payment instrument for secondary users who pay via a UPI Circle delegation from a primary account holder's bank account. Unlike UPI Intent (where no credential is submitted and an intent URI is returned), UPI Circle requires the secondary user's delegate VPA as an input credential. The buyer authenticates via biometrics or PSP app PIN — no bank MPIN is required from the secondary user.

display.description: Display information for this UPI Circle instrument.

name.description: Human-readable name for platform UI (e.g., 'Pay via UPI Circle').

logo.description: HTTPS URL to UPI logo for platform UI.

description.description: Optional description shown to the buyer (e.g., 'Pay using your linked UPI Circle account').
